verses.text: 'The Spirit of the Lord GOD is upon me... to preach good tidings unto the meek... to proclaim liberty to the captives,' to give 'beauty for ashes.' Jesus read this in Nazareth and claimed it. The anointed Christ brings the gospel of healing, freedom, and joy.

'The Spirit of the Lord GOD is upon me... to preach good tidings unto the meek... to proclaim liberty to the captives,' to give 'beauty for ashes.' Jesus read this in Nazareth and claimed it. The anointed Christ brings the gospel of healing, freedom, and joy.

'The Spirit of the Lord GOD is upon me... to preach good tidings unto the meek... to proclaim liberty to the captives,' to give 'beauty for ashes.' Jesus read this in Nazareth and claimed it. The anointed Christ brings the gospel of healing, freedom, and joy.
They shall rebuild ancient ruins and be named 'the Priests of the LORD,' served by the nations. Restoration and honour follow. God's redeemed are made a kingdom of priests, ministering before Him.
They shall rebuild ancient ruins and be named 'the Priests of the LORD,' served by the nations. Restoration and honour follow. God's redeemed are made a kingdom of priests, ministering before Him.
They shall rebuild ancient ruins and be named 'the Priests of the LORD,' served by the nations. Restoration and honour follow. God's redeemed are made a kingdom of priests, ministering before Him.

For their shame they shall receive 'double,' everlasting joy, and a seed renowned among the nations. Reproach is repaid with blessing. God turns His people's disgrace into honour and lasting gladness.

For their shame they shall receive 'double,' everlasting joy, and a seed renowned among the nations. Reproach is repaid with blessing. God turns His people's disgrace into honour and lasting gladness.

For their shame they shall receive 'double,' everlasting joy, and a seed renowned among the nations. Reproach is repaid with blessing. God turns His people's disgrace into honour and lasting gladness.

'I will greatly rejoice in the LORD... for he hath clothed me with the garments of salvation, the robe of righteousness.' This is the joy of the redeemed. God dresses His people in a righteousness not their own, like a bridegroom adorned.
